seoTitle: Yarrabah vs Yarrabilba — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Yarrabah and Yarrabilba. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yarrabah and Yarrabilba.
heading: Yarrabah vs Yarrabilba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarrabah, Queensland and Yarrabilba, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarrabilba has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Yarrabah (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarrabah or Yarrabilba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarrabah has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Yarrabilba scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarrabah scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Yarrabilba scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarrabah or Yarrabilba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarrabilba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
